services.title: Skip Hire
services.shortDescription: Ideal for home renovations, garden clearances, and general waste removal. Our skips provide a simple, cost-effective solution for keeping your project tidy, with fast delivery and collection available.

hero.title: Skip Hire Services
hero.subtitle: Fast, reliable skip hire for domestic and commercial projects across London and Surrey.

content.intro: Waste Management always has a large number of skips in various sizes in stock for immediate delivery or exchange. Whether you're clearing a garden, renovating your home, or managing a construction site, we have the right skip for your needs.
features: Skips available from 4 yard to 16 yard

sizes.description: Ideal for small garden clearances and minor DIY projects. Holds approximately 40 bin bags.
Perfect for medium-sized renovations and household clearances. Holds approximately 60 bin bags.
Our most popular size for larger home projects and small building works. Holds approximately 80 bin bags.
Suitable for substantial clearances and commercial waste. Holds approximately 110–120 bin bags.
Large capacity for major construction and demolition projects.

services.title: RoRo Hire
services.shortDescription: Designed for large commercial and construction projects, our RoRo containers handle high volumes of bulky and heavy waste. Rear-door access makes loading quick and efficient.

hero.title: Roll-on Roll-off (RoRo) Hire
hero.subtitle: High-capacity containers for large-scale commercial and construction waste management.

content.intro: Our Roll-on Roll-off containers are designed for projects that generate significant volumes of waste. With rear-door access for easy loading and robust construction for heavy materials, RoRo hire is the efficient choice for commercial sites.
features: Suitable for bulky and heavy waste

sizes.description: Compact RoRo container ideal for mid-size commercial projects with restricted access.
Maximum capacity container for large construction sites and industrial waste.

services.title: Wait and Load Service
services.shortDescription: Our driver waits while you load the vehicle, then takes your waste away immediately. Perfect when you need waste removed quickly without hiring a skip.

hero.title: Wait and Load Service
hero.subtitle: Quick waste removal without the wait – our team loads and goes.

content.intro: The Wait and Load service is perfect when you need waste removed quickly and don't have space for a skip. Our driver arrives, waits while you or our team loads the vehicle, and takes your waste away immediately.

services.title: 3rd Party Tipping
services.shortDescription: Licensed waste transfer station accepting third-party tipping for trade and commercial customers. Competitive rates with full waste documentation.

hero.title: 3rd Party Tipping
hero.subtitle: Licensed waste transfer for trade and commercial customers.

content.intro: Our licensed waste transfer facility accepts third-party tipping from trade customers, builders, and waste carriers. We provide full waste transfer documentation and competitive tipping rates.
features: Wide range of waste types accepted

services.title: Grab Loader & Muckaway
services.shortDescription: Efficient grab lorry services for site clearance, muckaway, and bulk waste removal. Reach over walls and fences for hard-to-access areas.

hero.title: Grab Loader & Muckaway Services
hero.subtitle: Professional site clearance and bulk waste removal with grab lorries.

content.intro: Our grab loader and muckaway services provide an efficient alternative to traditional skip hire. Grab lorries can reach over walls and fences, making them ideal for sites with limited access or where speed is essential.
features: Ideal for soil, rubble, and hardcore

services.title: Site Clearance
services.shortDescription: We provide professional site clearance services for construction, commercial, and industrial projects. Our team removes waste quickly and safely, helping keep your site clear and compliant.

hero.title: Site Clearance
hero.subtitle: Professional clearance for construction, commercial, and industrial projects.

content.intro: Our site clearance team handles everything from small garden clearances to large commercial and industrial projects. We work quickly and safely to keep your site clear, compliant, and ready for the next phase of work.

services.title: Trade Waste
services.shortDescription: Reliable trade waste collections for businesses of all sizes. We offer flexible waste management solutions to help keep your premises clean, organised, and environmentally responsible.

hero.title: Trade Waste Collections
hero.subtitle: Flexible waste management solutions for businesses of all sizes.

content.intro: Our trade waste collection service is designed for businesses that need regular, reliable waste removal. From small offices to large industrial premises, we tailor our service to your schedule and waste volumes.

services.title: Caged Van Hire
services.shortDescription: Perfect where skips aren't practical, our caged vans offer a flexible waste removal solution for site clearances, bulky waste collections, and restricted-access locations.

hero.title: Caged Van Hire
hero.subtitle: Flexible waste removal for restricted-access locations.

content.intro: When a skip isn't practical – due to access restrictions, parking limitations, or the nature of your waste – our caged vans provide the perfect alternative. Ideal for bulky items, site clearances, and locations where skips cannot be placed.
